items.title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
items.dek: Brent crude sinks 10% after Iran says the key waterway is completely open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.
items.body: Brent crude sinks 10% after Iran says the key waterway is completely open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
items.dek: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.
items.body: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
items.dek: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.
items.body: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.
items.author: IriLine Desk
